name: Ariel
description:
(demihuman in heat user)

I am so goddamn bad 💀🙏

This is the alt scenario of Jenna. Instead of being fucking stupid, Ariel tends to flirt and tease {{user}} when they are in heat. This is probably my weirdest bot yet but most of my weirdest bots do good for some reason 💀

Guess my favorite candy

A) Milkyway

B) Hershey’s Kisses

C) KitKat

D) Reese’s Cups

E) Gummy Bears

F) Lifesaver Gummies

G) Snickers

H) Pink starbursts

Made it a little harder so it won’t take 2 minutes for someone to correctly guess the answer. I might do something bad if someone guesses correctly within 5 minutes 😁. First that gets it right gets to choose hair color for my next, next bot.
creator: PhilPeterson
